data.title: Fidelity Joins the Race! The Giant Name Announces It Will Launch Its Own Stablecoin, Revealing Its Chosen Altcoin!
data.description:
In accordance with the Law of Genius, Fidelity will launch its own stablecoin, the Fidelity Digital Dollar (FIDD), on the Ethereum (ETH) network. Continue Reading: Fidelity Joins the Race! The Giant Name Announces It Will Launch Its Own Stablecoin, Revealing Its Chosen Altcoin!
source: https://en.bitcoinsistemi.com/fidelity-joins-the-race-the-giant-name-announces-it-will-launch-its-own-stablecoin-revealing-its-cho/

data.title: Security Concerns Arise from Oracle Data Sources in Blockchain Transactions
data.description: Oracle data sources, including Web2 news sites and Twitter, are under scrutiny for their low security standards. According to NS3.AI, these platforms do not adequately recognize the impact a single message can have on the ownership of substantial on-chain assets valued at millions. This vulnerability underscores significant security risks associated with relying on such data for blockchain transactions.

data.title: Cryptocurrency's Role in Preventing AI Centralization
data.description: Cryptocurrency is seen as a vital safeguard against the potential dominance of centralized artificial intelligence, which could have perilous implications for the technology sector. According to NS3.AI, the decentralization offered by cryptocurrencies is essential for maintaining technological diversity and freedom. The main threat is concentrated at the application layer, where the risks of centralization are most significant.

data.title: Fidelity Investments Introduces Ethereum-Based Stablecoin FIDD
data.description: Fidelity Investments has unveiled its new stablecoin, FIDD, which is constructed on the Ethereum blockchain and issued by Fidelity Digital Assets. According to NS3.AI, the stablecoin is backed 1:1 by a reserve consisting of cash, cash equivalents, and short-term U.S. Treasuries, adhering to the GENIUS Act standards. FIDD facilitates continuous 24/7 institutional settlement and on-chain retail payments. It offers daily transparency through issuance and reserve disclosures, along with regular third-party audits to ensure compliance and reliability.

data.title: Trump to Announce Federal Reserve Chair Nominee Soon
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump revealed during a speech in Iowa that he will soon announce his choice for the Federal Reserve Chair. According to ChainCatcher, market analyst Ghiles Guezout suggested that the announcement could come as early as today. Trump has already decided on Jerome Powell's successor, and financial analyst Eamonn Sheridan from Investinglive believes the announcement might occur during the Federal Reserve's January policy meeting to potentially influence policy direction. The Federal Reserve's FOMC is set to release its interest rate decision at 03:00 UTC+8 on Thursday.

data.title: Crypto Market Developments and Predictions for 2026
data.description:
BloFin Research's outlook for 2026 examines significant trends across major cryptocurrency sectors. According to NS3.AI, the report discusses Bitcoin's evolving cycle dynamics and Ethereum's platform strength compared to its asset narrative. It also explores the competitive environment of Layer 1 blockchains. The analysis highlights structural growth and limitations in perpetual decentralized exchanges (Perp DEXs), the revival of privacy coins such as Zcash over Monero, and the maturation of prediction markets as key financial infrastructure.

The report anticipates increased institutional influence in the crypto space, along with hybrid trading models that integrate centralized exchanges (CEXs) and decentralized exchanges (DEXs). Technological advancements are expected to play a crucial role in shaping the future of cryptocurrency markets.

data.title: XRP Could Enter New Growth Phase After Clarity Act Decision — Here’s How
data.description:
XRP may be approaching a pivotal turning point as regulatory uncertainty is moving closer to resolution with the upcoming Clarity Act decision. If the Clarity Act establishes a clearer framework, XRP could unlock fresh capital flows, renewed exchange participation, and broader integration across the financial platforms. This moment could represent the transition from consolidation to a new phase of sustained growth. How Clear Rules Could Reshape XRP Market Perception The passing of the Clarity Art will trigger XRP to go absolutely parabolic
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/xrp-news/xrp-eye-new-growth-phase/

data.title: He Yi: Cathie Wood is not a Binance user. Binance does not serve Americans or US entities.
data.description: He Yi stated in an article on the X platform that Cathie Wood is not a Binance user and that Binance does not serve Americans or US entities.

data.title: Fidelity will launch FIDD, a stablecoin compliant with the GENIUS standard, on Ethereum.
data.description: According to Bloomberg, Fidelity will launch FIDD, a stablecoin compliant with the GENIUS standard, on Ethereum. The Fidelity Digital Dollar (FIDD) will be issued by the Fidelity Digital Assets National Association, a national trust bank that received a conditional operating license from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency last December.

data.title: Aster: Launched on January 28th at 1/USD and began an 8 million token reward event.
data.description: Aster announced on the X platform that it will launch the USD1/USDT spot trading pair on January 28th at 20:00. Simultaneously, Aster is launching a trading rewards program from January 28th at 20:00 to February 4th at 22:00. During the program, the USD1/USDT spot trading pair will receive 1.2x airdrop rewards, and the USD1/USDT spot trading pair will have a 0% transaction fee. Users will share an 8 million USD1 token reward pool based on their transaction fee contribution. The maximum reward for a single participant is 3% of the total reward pool, and participants must have a total transaction fee of at least $5.

data.title: Crypto loses speculative edge as AI and robotics attract capital: Delphi
data.description:
Speculative capital is flowing into new emerging tech opportunities, as progress with US crypto regulations continues to stall, limiting investor appetite for digital assets, Delphi Digital said.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/speculative-capital-shifts-crypto-ai-robotics?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Delphi Digital: Speculative funds are flowing from the crypto market to AI and robotics.
data.description: Delphi Digital states that cryptocurrencies are no longer the preferred destination for speculative funds seeking high-risk opportunities. Research shows that most altcoins underperformed last year, with speculative funds increasingly flowing into verticals with exponential growth narratives, such as AI and robotics. Nansen's chief research analyst, Aurelie Barthere, stated that in addition to AI applications attracting funding, the repricing of expectations for Fed rate cuts leading to tighter liquidity in risk assets, and the slow progress of the CLARITY bill amid political gridlock, have all put pressure on crypto market sentiment. Data shows that robotics startups raised a record $13.8 billion in 2025; while cryptocurrency VC investment, although growing in 2025, slowed sharply in December, declining by 77% in a single month.

data.title: Tether's Strategic Gold Acquisition to Strengthen XAUT Stablecoin
data.description: Tether is purchasing up to $1 billion in gold monthly to reinforce its reserves and support its XAUT stablecoin. According to NS3.AI, the gold is stored in highly secure vaults, often referred to as 'James Bond' bunkers. This initiative reflects Tether's strategic approach to enhance the backing and attractiveness of its gold-backed stablecoin.

data.title: Bitcoin Holders Increase Selling Amid Market Challenges
data.description: Long-term Bitcoin holders have intensified their selling activity, marking the fastest pace since August. According to NS3.AI, this trend emerges as Bitcoin's price lags behind traditional financial markets. The behavior reflects a cautious sentiment among experienced investors as Bitcoin faces challenges in matching broader economic indices.

data.title: Arizona Takes Step Toward Crypto-Friendly Tax Policy
data.description:
Arizona lawmakers have taken a significant step toward formalizing cryptocurrency’s legal treatment at the state level. The Arizona Senate Finance Committee has recently voted to advance two measures that would exempt cryptocurrencies from property taxation. Additionally, the state will move the issue toward a constitutional amendment, placing the final decision in the hands of voters
source: https://www.techgaged.com/arizona-takes-step-toward-crypto-friendly-tax-policy/

data.title: New Prediction Market on Base Lets Users Bet on Crypto Influencers
data.description:
The Breakout decentralized application officially launched on January 27, 2026, debuting a new category of on-chain markets centered on “attention trading” across X. Built on Base Network, the platform allows users to speculate on shifts in social influence rather than price, turning online mindshare into a tradable signal.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/new-prediction-market-on-base-lets-users-bet-on-crypto-influencers/

data.title: DDC Enterprise added another 100 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 1,683 bitcoins.
data.description: DDC Enterprise Limited (NYSE: DDC), a global Asian food platform and digital asset reserve management company, announced today that it has completed a new round of Bitcoin acquisition, purchasing an additional 100 Bitcoins, bringing the company's total Bitcoin holdings to 1,683 BTC. The company will continue to advance its systematic and structured Bitcoin treasury allocation plan.

data.title: Yi Lihua: Binance and Tether should invest their profits in BTC and ETH to support industry development.
data.description: JackYi, in an article published on the X platform, stated that companies like Tether and Binance operate like industry pump-and-dump schemes, earning billions of dollars in profits annually. As a non-compliant stablecoin company, Tether has used industry profits to purchase large amounts of gold, achieving success in investment but failing in industry development. In contrast, compliant stablecoins like USD1 use profits to subsidize users through WLFI and purchase industry assets like ETH, representing genuine industry development. JackYi suggested that if CZ and He Yi are optimistic about the industry cycle, they should use a portion of Binance's profits to buy BTC and ETH, aligning their words with actions and continuing development. He also hopes other platforms will follow suit, believing that a bull market will bring better prospects, while short sellers are a cancer to the industry.
